patch.value: deriveExtensionCapabilities omits 'schema' for a CommandDefinition with inline flags (manifest under-grant would fail activation)

Surfaced while building describeExtensionBlueprint (pm-tlpv): `deriveExtensionCapabilities(blueprint)` only scanned the top-level blueprint fields, so a blueprint whose only schema-requiring surface is a command-definition's INLINE `flags` array (e.g. `commands: [{ name, run, flags: [...] }]` with no separate top-level `flags` record) derived `["commands"]` and omitted `"schema"`.

Impact: at activation `registerCommand` calls `assertExtensionCapability(extension, "schema", "registerCommand flags")` (loader.ts:1854-1855) for any command with `flags !== undefined`. An author who set `manifest.capabilities = deriveExtensionCapabilities(blueprint)` would therefore ship an UNDER-granted manifest that throws `extension_capability_missing` on load — the exact opposite of the helper's purpose.

Fix: deriveExtensionCapabilities now adds `"schema"` when any `blueprint.commands[].flags !== undefined`, mirroring the loader's exact guard (including an empty inline array). describeExtensionBlueprint's `flag_commands` already unions inline-flag command paths with the top-level `flags` keys, so the static summary and the capability set agree, and the describe parity test (static == runtime describeExtensionActivation) over an inline-flags blueprint pins it. Regression source: pm-iqq0 (composeExtension/deriveExtensionCapabilities). Discovered by: pm-tlpv. Was previously untested.

Fixed: deriveExtensionCapabilities now adds schema when any blueprint.commands[].flags !== undefined, mirroring the loader's registerCommand-flags guard, so a derived manifest no longer under-grants and fails activation. Covered by a new unit test and pinned by the describeExtensionBlueprint inline-flags parity test.
deriveExtensionCapabilities now adds schema for inline-flags command definitions.
deriveExtensionCapabilities(blueprint) yields a manifest grant that activates without extension_capability_missing.
Added schema when any blueprint.commands[].flags !== undefined; unit-tested and pinned by the inline-flags parity test.
